name: gramatr
description: Real-time intelligent context engineering that makes every prompt cheaper, faster, and context-aware.
tagline: Patent-pending real-time intelligent context engineering for every AI tool you use.
long_description: grāmatr℠ is a patent-pending real-time intelligent context engineering layer that sits between you and every AI model you use. Every prompt runs through a multi-head classification pipeline that pre-routes the request, assembles behavioral directives and quality criteria, and pulls relevant context from past work — so the model skips orientation overhead and starts working immediately. Measurable result: ~2,700 tokens delivered as input context per request, displacing the reasoning Claude would otherwise generate as expensive output tokens. Compounding the longer the session runs. Works across Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Codex, Gemini, and VS Code.
featured_use_cases: Resume yesterday's project from any AI tool, on any device
Save your preferences once — every assistant respects them
Pre-classified prompts mean faster, cheaper answers
Quality checks and structured execution baked into every task
Consistent AI behavior across every session — same standards, same quality gates, same preferences, every time.
